name: agent402-ai-sdk
description: Drop-in Vercel AI SDK tools for Agent402: turn 1,000+ pay-per-call web tools into AI SDK tool() instances, with auto-payment (proof-of-work free, USDC via x402 paid). Works with streamText, generateText, generateObject. Zero deps.
